overall.description: A first-person perspective video from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving briefly through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night, then walking through busy streets and covered traditional Japanese-style walkways. The scene features vibrant pink and cyan neon billboards, wet reflective streets, and a mix of modern skyscrapers with traditional architectural elements.

tropical palm tree lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The red frame of the vehicle is visible in the foreground as it moves along wet asphalt streets lined with palm trees and massive neon billboards, including a prominent 'SOFTSYS' building.

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to walking as the character exits the vehicle and crosses a busy neon-lit intersection. The camera moves across yellow crosswalk stripes while pedestrians with umbrellas and a yellow sports car share the space. A traditional Japanese gate becomes visible in the distance against the backdrop of towering glass buildings.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway featuring traditional Japanese architecture mixed with cyberpunk aesthetics. The space is defined by wooden lattice roofs and pillars, illuminated by striking purple neon ceiling lights. Blue illuminated benches line the right side as pedestrians walk through this sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with street food vendors and holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back into the open street environment
passing street food stalls and vendors with illuminated umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past food vendors and other pedestrians in the open neon-lit street

cars driving on the wet multi-lane street to the left

large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated content

metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens back onto the bustling neon-lit street. The character walks past food vendor carts with glowing umbrellas on the right, while a distinctive curved glass tower rises in the center distance. Holographic billboards float above the wet pavement as cars drive by on the left.

segments.scene_description: The character re-enters the covered walkway marked by a red 'Gill' sign, returning to the sheltered corridor with its distinctive purple neon lighting and traditional Japanese wooden architecture. Blue benches line the path as the character continues walking through this enclosed space toward the distant street exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the interior of a moving vehicle into the heart of a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that blends futuristic neon with traditional Japanese architecture. It begins inside a vehicle framed in red, gliding past palm trees and massive neon billboards like the SOFTSYS building along wet asphalt. As the character exits the car, the perspective shifts to a walking pace, crossing a busy intersection filled with pedestrians and yellow crosswalks before approaching a traditional Japanese gate set against towering glass skyscrapers. The scene then transitions into a sheltered pedestrian walkway defined by wooden lattice roofs and striking purple neon ceiling lights, before opening back onto the bustling street to pass glowing food vendor carts and a curved glass tower. Finally, the camera turns back into the covered corridor under a red Gill sign, returning to the rhythmic pattern of blue benches and purple illumination as it moves toward a distant exit.
